title: New generation ICG-based contrast agents for ultrasound-switchable fluorescence imaging.
author: Yu S Cheng B Yao T Xu C Nguyen KT Hong Y Yuan B
content: S-EPMC5075910 PMC5075910 New generation ICG-based contrast agents for ultrasound-switchable fluorescence imaging. Recently, we developed a new technology, ultrasound-switchable fluorescence (USF), for high-resolution imaging in centimeter-deep tissues via fluorescence contrast. The success of USF
